ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the client */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the client */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer or business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the client is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the client resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code for the client's location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the client's address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the client's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the client is located */,
  "billing_rate" REAL /* Billing rate for the client */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the client (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client being billed */,
  "billed_amount" REAL /* Total amount billed in the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice payment */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., paid, unpaid, overdue) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  "billing_rate" REAL /* Billing rate for the invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number */,
  "po_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number associated with the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES invoice_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service or product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the service or product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the service or product */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the service or product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice being paid */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid towards the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of this payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, finance, project manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was set */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Message content of the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history record */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment made */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client associated with the contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_contacts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_invoice_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_invoice_history_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_invoice_history_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client receiving the notification */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "expense_description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)
